one_line_positioning: AI Product Engineer who builds and scales AI automation from zero, with a track record of cost optimization and user growth.
narrative_angle: Combines deep LLM engineering with a product mindset, having scaled an AI app to 450+ users and achieved 98% cost reduction; ready to apply this end-to-end ownership to automate and scale BukuWarung's financial workflows for small businesses.
lead_strengths: Reduced inference cost by 98% (from $1.20 to $0.023) while improving latency from 15s to 3s.
Scaled AI companion app to 450+ users with 13-15% weekly retention and zero paid acquisition.
Built production AI system for quality workflows at Omnex, reducing manual effort and improving consistency.
proof_points_to_emphasize: Reduced inference cost per conversation from $1.20 to $0.023
Scaled to 450+ users with 13-15% weekly retention
Automated user acquisition via Reddit bot, increasing activation from 20% to 75%
Built AI product manager that monitors system behavior and automates observability
things_to_downplay: Domain experience is in consumer AI, not fintech or bookkeeping
tone_guidance: Outcome-first, emphasize business impact and scalability, use startup language (growth, retention, cost optimization), avoid over-technical AI jargon, keep it product-focused.
recruiter_first_impression_target: This candidate is a rare find: an AI engineer who thinks like a product owner and has delivered measurable business outcomes.
reasoning: Differentiator: full-stack AI product engineering with proven cost optimization and user growth from zero. All must-have requirements are strongly evidenced (Python, LLM, MLOps, deployment, automation, cross-functional collaboration). Gaps in nice-to-haves (Java, MCP) and domain are minor given the role's focus on general AI automation. Stance is STRONG_PUSH because the candidate's unique blend of engineering rigor and business-outcome thinking aligns perfectly with BukuWarung's need for an AI product engineer who can build self-serve tools and drive efficiency.
